summary: Complete testing of Armor Card Redesign with Wiki Images feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including grid layout, wiki images, shield placeholders, type badges, variant selection, filter buttons, search, and expand/collapse.

issues: Minor console hydration warnings (span inside select/option) - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected

critical_code_review_comments: Armor images correctly fetched from Star Citizen Wiki API on server startup
ARMOR_WIKI_OVERRIDES properly maps 23 armor names to wiki page titles
get_armor_image() correctly falls back to empty string for missing images
ArmorCard component correctly handles both image and placeholder states
Grid layout uses responsive columns (lg:3, md:2, sm:1)
Variant selection properly updates displayed name via React state

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All armor card UI tests + regression tests passed)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - Armor images fetched from Star Citizen Wiki API and cached on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Armor card redesign with wiki images fully tested and working. 18/21 armor sets have wiki images (85.7% coverage). Missing images for Antium, Corbel, Sterling show shield placeholder. Grid layout with 3 columns on desktop, variant dropdowns work, all filter buttons work. FPS Weapons (38) and Equipment (23) tabs use list layout unchanged. Use test user geartest/password123.
